caption:
💉 Neon lights cut through the acid rain as I adjusted my holographic jacket. The club wasn't on any map, pulsing with a bass that vibrated in my marrow. I was here to meet a dealer, but the air smelled like ozone and something sweeter... anticipation.

My latex bodysuit whispered against my skin, every curve designed to deflect eyes while drawing them deeper. The fabric clung, hugging my hips, hinting at the swell of my chest beneath. I moved like smoke, a ghost in the machine.

He found me at the edge of the stage. "You're late," he growled, his cybernetic eye whirring to focus on me. I smiled, letting the hem of my skirt lift just enough to show a sliver of thigh. "Traffic was heavy," I purred, letting the synthetic silk stretch across my shoulders. "But I made the time."

The dance floor was a maze of sensors, and every touch triggered a response. I spun, feeling the hum of his implants syncing with mine. The neon reflections danced across my skin, highlighting the sweat on my collarbone. He reached for my hand, his grip electric. "Show me how you move in the dark," he whispered.

I closed my eyes, letting the rhythm take over. Every step was calculated, every glance a promise. The city screamed around us, but in this moment, it was just us and the pulse of the neon.

He pulled me close, his breath warm against my neck. "One more," he murmured.

The data transfer was almost complete. My skin tingled with the electricity of the connection. He kissed me, deep and hungry, the taste of synthetic fruit and static. The world blurred into static and neon, a private universe where only our desire existed.

#CyberpunkAesthetic #NeonNights #StreetDancer #SciFiRomance #CyberGirl #FutureTech #DigitalDesire
